name: Cantaloupe Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully cut three cantaloupes in half using a very sharp knife, cutting in a zig-zag pattern.
2. Scoop out and discard the seeds from each half.
3. Using a melon ball scooper, scoop out the flesh of the cantaloupes, stopping at the green rind. Repeat with the remaining fourth cantaloupe.
4. Transfer all the scooped cantaloupe pieces to a food processor.
5. Add granulated sugar, mint leaves (for garnish), a splash of port wine, and a splash of lemon juice.
6. Process until combined but retain some texture; avoid over-processing.
7. Garnish with remaining mint leaves before serving.
